title: RAG pipelines choke on real traffic
meta_description: Cut RAG latency 78% and AWS costs 35% with semantic cache keys, Rust vector search, and hybrid SQLite/Redis caching — the real levers most tutorials skip.
prewritten_tweet:
Most RAG tutorials teach you to shard indices and buy GPUs.

They skip the real bottleneck: your cache key.
